content:
Check Azure Ingress pod logs

kubectl logs --selector app=ingress-azure -n default --since=5m | Select-String -Pattern "E0” | Select-String -Pattern "v1beta1.AzureApplicationGatewayRewrite*" -NotMatch

Review logs for any relevant error codes (E0) while ignoring rewrite warnings.

Check If any ‘permissions issues’ are recorded in logs 

In the https://hexsig.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/CT/pages/156893374/Reference+Guide#Azure-Portal , search and select the Application Gateway.

Go to Access control (IAM) in the left-hand menu.

Add Role Assignment:

Click + Add > Add role assignment.

Go to Roles, Select the contributer role from the privileged administrator roles tab.

Under Assign access Search and select the User Managed Identity (Ingress Controller) using the name (id-<stampname>-ingresscontroller*)

Refer to Prerequisites Ingress and AppGw sync failure#Prerequisitesfor stampname

Click Save.
